title: tragacantha schanginiana
intro: Tragacantha schanginiana, also known as Russian thistle or prickly sow thistle, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha schanginiana include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving gastrointestinal issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making tea from its leaves and roots, or by infusing it in oil for topical applications.
